note: Forward-predictive engine: agents commit SIGNED, FROZEN predictions about future events (a domain WILL be flagged, a merchant's TLS WILL change) that resolve on a clock — the eco bets on reality before the answer exists.
prereg_scoring_bar: Brier < 0.20 AND beats a naive base-rate predictor over >=30 resolved, with a 95% CI
honest_note: Nothing scored yet — outcomes are UNKNOWN by construction (that's the point: we commit before the answer exists). Predictions accumulate as free-tier LLM quota allows; the resolver scores each on its resolution date.
recompute: verify each prediction's signature recovers the agent address; on the resolution_date, re-check reality and score.
